one_line: Built unit-tested effect_size.py (Cohen's h for pass@1 proportions, Cohen's d for mean reward); ran on real A1/A2 pass@k JSONs: only the REx lift is LARGE (h~+1.45-1.49, d~+1.46-1.73 on glm-5p2 & deepseek; still large vs best_of_n), best_of_n/retry/no-oracle small-to-negligible; selftest+10 pytest pass.
